releaseNotes:
🚀 Major Update v1.1.3 — FLASH Advanced Engine + SIM Learning Fixes

🔥 Core Improvements:
• Signature learning now follows the selected mother SIM automatically
• Advanced FLASH execution engine is now significantly faster
• Immediate step advancement after Send click
• Improved realtime USSD prompt detection
• Reduced keyboard popup interference during transactions
• Better Send button recovery and retry handling

⚡ Advanced USSD Improvements:
• Faster advanced session execution timing
• Improved prompt-to-prompt transition speed
• Better trusted USSD window detection
• Improved dynamic learned menu option matching
• Reduced unnecessary waiting between USSD prompts

🧠 Signature Learning Improvements:
• Learning now stores and uses the correct SIM slot
• Improved menu signature stability
• Better handling of moved Safaricom menu options
• Safer dynamic option matching during execution

🛠️ Stability Improvements:
• Improved accessibility execution consistency
• Better handling of interrupted sessions
• Improved root window detection scoring
• Reduced UI freezing during active transactions
• Improved transaction recovery behavior

✅ Overall: Faster FLASH transactions, smarter learning flow, improved SIM handling, and more stable advanced USSD execution.
